# Repository Instructions

Follow the repository-level guidance in `AGENTS.md`.

This repository is a reusable documentation-first coordination kit. Keep changes focused on prompts, templates, runbook rules, and explanatory docs. Do not add live run artifacts, generated coordination logs, or project-specific workspaces to this repository.

For documentation changes:

- preserve the stage-based reading flow
- update related README files when entry points or file locations change
- keep English and Japanese front-door guidance aligned when both are present
- keep competitive trial material as an optional profile rather than the default concept
- avoid hard-coding current model names, pricing assumptions, or tool-specific defaults as durable policy

For reviews, prioritize correctness of boundaries, topology, handoff, verification, and sign-off rules over wording preferences.
